languages.text: Полная медицинская диагностика — процесс не из приятных, но после тотальной санации вашего организма тело ощущается практически неуязвимым.
Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.
languages.original_text: Полная медицинская диагностика — процесс не из приятных, но после тотальной санации вашего организма тело ощущается практически неуязвимым.

traits.locale_text: Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.
Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.
Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.

languages.text: 徹底的な医療診断を受けることは、決して楽しいことではありませんが、身体の徹底的な浄化の後には、実質的に無敵に感じます。
languages.original_text: Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.

traits.locale_text: 徹底的な医療診断を受けることは、決して楽しいことではありませんが、身体の徹底的な浄化の後には、実質的に無敵に感じます。

languages.text: Tam bir tıbbi teşhisten geçmek hoş olmasa da vücudunun kapsamlı arındırılmasının ardından kendini, neredeyse zarar görmez hissediyorsun.
languages.original_text: Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.

traits.locale_text: Tam bir tıbbi teşhisten geçmek hoş olmasa da vücudunun kapsamlı arındırılmasının ardından kendini, neredeyse zarar görmez hissediyorsun.

languages.text: Someterse a un diagnóstico médico integral no es un proceso agradable, pero tras un exhaustivo saneamiento físico te sientes prácticamente invulnerable.
languages.original_text: Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.

traits.locale_text: Someterse a un diagnóstico médico integral no es un proceso agradable, pero tras un exhaustivo saneamiento físico te sientes prácticamente invulnerable.

languages.text: 接受一次完整的医疗诊断并非愉快的体验，但在身体经过全面净化后，你感觉自己几乎坚不可摧。
languages.original_text: Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.

traits.locale_text: 接受一次完整的医疗诊断并非愉快的体验，但在身体经过全面净化后，你感觉自己几乎坚不可摧。

languages.text: Se prêter à un bilan médical complet n'est guère plaisant, mais à l'issue de la purification exhaustive de votre corps, vous vous sentez pour ainsi dire invulnérable.
languages.original_text: Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.

traits.locale_text: Se prêter à un bilan médical complet n'est guère plaisant, mais à l'issue de la purification exhaustive de votre corps, vous vous sentez pour ainsi dire invulnérable.

languages.text: Eine umfassende medizinische Diagnose ist ein angenehmer Vorgang, aber nach der sorgfältigen Reinigung deines Körpers fühlst du dich praktisch unverwundbar.
languages.original_text: Undergoing a complete medical diagnostic is not a pleasant process, but after the comprehensive sanitisation of your body, you feel practically invulnerable.

traits.locale_text: Eine umfassende medizinische Diagnose ist ein angenehmer Vorgang, aber nach der sorgfältigen Reinigung deines Körpers fühlst du dich praktisch unverwundbar.
